calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Bar of California, a public corporation.
No appearance by defendant Steven P. Coleman, an idividual.
Default was entered against defendant on May 5, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed July 30, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on 8/7/09.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff the State Bar of California, a public corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Steven P. Coleman, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $47,344.69.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,628.25.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $53,972.94.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
